children.text: Sacrifice moves become route tools instead of spectacle.
The plan treats Explosion and Selfdestruct as human trade decisions.
Sacrifice moves can be over- or under-valued without a route-value gate.
Planned scoring: spend them only when public route value is high.
Meaningful trades remove a public threat, deny setup, or open the boss's route.
Measured through fixtures before source changes.
Do not call hidden party or current-input helpers to decide whether the trade is good.
Use active visible pressure and already seen species only.
Cash out only when the trade matters.
